LinkedJoin.Join: CPR.CASE_NUMBER = AEA.CASE_NUMBER AND CPR.PARTY_ROLE_CODE = AEA.PARTY_AGAINST_PARTY_ROLE_CODE AND CPR.CASE_PARTY_NO = AEA.PARTY_AGAINST_CASE_PARTY_NO AND P.PARTY_ID = CPR.PARTY_ID AND PR.PARTY_ROLE_CODE = CPR.PARTY_ROLE_CODE AND GA.ADDRESS_ID IN ( SELECT GA2.ADDRESS_ID FROM GIVEN_ADDRESSES GA2 WHERE (GA2.CASE_NUMBER = CPR.CASE_NUMBER AND GA2.PARTY_ROLE_CODE = CPR.PARTY_ROLE_CODE AND GA2.CASE_PARTY_NO = CPR.CASE_PARTY_NO AND GA2.VALID_TO IS NULL AND GA2.ADDRESS_TYPE_CODE = 'SERVICE' ) OR (GA2.CASE_NUMBER IS NULL AND GA2.PARTY_ROLE_CODE IS NULL AND GA2.CASE_PARTY_NO IS NULL AND GA2.PARTY_ID = CPR.PARTY_ID AND GA2.ADDRESS_TYPE_CODE = 'CODED PARTY' ) )
E.AE_NUMBER = AEA.AE_NUMBER AND E.ERROR_INDICATOR = 'N' AND E.STD_EVENT_ID IN (888, 889, 890, 900)
